telco-opa-commercial-product-evidence.description: OPA governance evidence should be present for commercial API products.
telco-opa-commercial-product-evidence.message: Commercial APIs should carry OPA validation evidence for API Product, Moesif billing and settlement governance.

telco-opa-open-gateway-risk-evidence.description: High-risk Open Gateway APIs should have OPA validation evidence.
telco-opa-open-gateway-risk-evidence.message: Open Gateway fraud, SIM swap and location APIs should carry OPA evidence for premium controls and billable meters.

telco-opa-regional-gateway-evidence.description: Regional and federated gateway readiness should be validated by OPA.
telco-opa-regional-gateway-evidence.message: Federated gateway and regional failover readiness should be validated by OPA and visible as APIM governance evidence.
